title: Raw Input - Legacy
description: Use raw input on Minecraft 1.9~1.11.2 . Make mouse input feel smoother and fix mouse jittering.
body:
**This mod is a backport for [Raw Mouse Input - Blessed Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/raw-mouse-input-blessed-edition) mod, support Minecraft versions from 1.9 to 1.11.2**

## Description

Backport raw input feature to Minecraft 1.9~1.11.2 . Can make mouse input feel smoother and fix mouse jittering.
## Usage
 - `/rawinput` - Toggles the raw input.
 - `/rescan` - Rescans for a mouse - Use if mouse input is not working.

Both commands have keybinds that are unbound by default.
## Credit
Fork of [https://github.com/MARYT-Studio/RawInputMod-BlessedEdition](https://github.com/MARYT-Studio/RawInputMod-BlessedEdition)
